Description: Validate that the customer profile page is available from the claim intake flow.
Action: Login to Claim Center as a valid user.
Expected Result: User should be able to login successfully.

Action: Navigate to Claim > New Claim and search with a valid synthetic policy.
Expected Result: Policy should be found and the user should be navigated to the claim intake flow.

Action: Navigate to the customer profile screen and verify that the screen is enabled.
Expected Result: Customer profile screen should be enabled.

Summary: Validate insured information on customer profile
Description: Validate that insured information is retrieved and displayed for a synthetic policy.
Action: Login to Claim Center as a valid user.
Expected Result: User should be able to login successfully.

Action: Navigate to Claim > New Claim and search with a valid synthetic policy.
Expected Result: Policy should be found and the user should be navigated to the claim intake flow.

Action: Navigate to the customer profile screen and validate that the system retrieves and displays insured information from the configured source.
Expected Result: Correct insured information should be displayed.

Summary: Validate customer policies on customer profile
Description: Validate that policies tied to the same synthetic customer ID are displayed.
Action: Login to Claim Center as a valid user.
Expected Result: User should be able to login successfully.

Action: Navigate to Claim > New Claim and search with a valid synthetic policy.
Expected Result: Policy should be found and the user should be navigated to the claim intake flow.

Action: Navigate to the customer profile screen and verify that all policies tied to the same synthetic customer ID appear under Customer Policies.
Expected Result: Customer Policies table should display all policies tied to the same synthetic customer ID.
